raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nosuhtija tas Keh-
ninsch Zedekijus/ un dabbuja to
Prawectu Jeremiju pee ſewim
trechā ee-etjama Weeta/ kas pee
ta KUNGA Namma bija. Un
tas Kehninsch fazzija us Jeremi-
ju: Es watzaschu tewi tahdu
Leetu/ ne aptlep preeſch man-
nim neneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jeremijus
us Zedekiju: Kad es tew to stah-
stitchu/ tad tu manni teescham
nokauti/ un kad es tew Padoh-
mu dohtchu/ tad tomehr tu man-
nis ne klaufift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad swehreja tas Keh-
ninsch Zedekijus Jeremijum pa-
fleppeni/ un fazzija: Tik teeſcham
ka tas KUNGS dshwo/ kas was/
kas eekſch ta Kehnitz
mums scho Dwehfeli irr darrijs/
es ne nokauschu tewi/ un ne no-
dohschu tewi tcheem Wihtreem
Rohkā/ kas tawu Dwehfeli
wiekte.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jeremijus us
Zedekiju: Ta jatta tas KUNgs/
tas Deews Zebaot/ tas Israēta
Deews: Ja tu ar labbu Brahtu
tseefi pee teem Leel-Kungeim ta
Kehnina no Babels/ tad tawa
Dwehfele dshwohs / un schis
Pilsfahts ne taps ar Ugguni
fadedsinabts/ un tad dshwost tu/
un taws Rams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja tu ne tseefi pee
teem Leel-Kungeim ta Kehnia
Babeles/ tad taps schis Pils-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Zei-
jus fazzija us Jeremiju: Es
stohe par teem Judeem/kas
ta Kaldeereem irr peekrittuschi
tee manni winno Rohkā ne de
un tee mannis apmehd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus faz-
Tee tewi ne uodobe/ klausi
ta KUNGA Balknei/ ko es
tewi runnaju/ tad tew labbi
tees / un tawa Dwehfcle
wohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tu leedsees
eet/ tad irr schis tas Wahrd-
tas KUNGS man irr pa
dijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redsi/ tad wiſfas
kas eekſch ta Kehnitz
Juhda Nanna atleeſ/ tap
westas pee teem Leel-Kung
ta Kehnina no Babeles/ un
fazzibs: Tawi Eepreezinata
tewi skubbinaſcht/ un irr
pahrwarrejscht/ tawas Ka
irr Duhnās grimmuschas/
wiant pascht irr atpakat
suschees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta taps wiſfas ta
Seewas/ un wiſti tawi B
iswesti pee teem Kaldeereem
tu vats ne issprukſi no w
Rohkahm/ bet tu tapſi za
Rohku ta Kehnina no Ba
figrahbts / un fadedsina
Pilsfahtu ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Zedekiju
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
